name: Clyde Austin 4-h Center
description: Clyde Austin 4-h Center is a place to play pickleball in Greeneville, TN. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: YMCA of Greene County
description: YMCA of Greene County is a place to play pickleball in Greeneville, TN. There are 6 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.
